mandate: Never change user-provided logo artwork without prior explicit approval.
currently_authorized_transformations: Remove only the near-white background from the protected JPEG to create a transparent PNG derivative; preserve the complete artwork, typography, spacing, colors, proportions, and 1024x718 geometry.
approval_scope: A new explicit approval naming the exact asset and exact transformation is required before any asset-byte change.
presentation_rule: Always display the complete approved Checkmate Holding Group lockup, including the name beneath the symbol. The transparent derivative may use CSS-only living light, outline geometry, and drop shadows behind or around it. Containers must use contain and centre alignment; artwork must never be clipped, covered, redrawn, retyped, or substituted.
